title: The Master Herbalist Fragrant FRESH LINEN Scented Wardrobe Freshener Sachets in a WILLIAM MORRIS Design in SAGE GREEN | Pack of 2
features: The Master Herbalist's FRESH LINEN Hanging Wardrobe Freshener or Drawer Sachet, scented with essential oils. It comes with an integrated retractable hook so you can hang it in your wardrobe or lay it in a drawer or cupboard.
Available in 5 fragrances: Lavender, Sandalwood, Rose, Lily and Fresh Linen
Each Wardrobe Freshener measures 16 cm x 10 cm (approx 6" x 4").

LONG LASTING NATURAL FRAGRANCE: Our fragrances are MADE IN BRITAIN to the highest standards. Allergen free, they are formulations designed to last whilst imparting a gentle fragrance over time. PERFUME will be strong on opening but relax in the first few hours. We recommend you unpack and leave for an hour or so for the fragrance to soften.
SUSTAINABLE & MADE IN THE UK. FSC approved paper, Recyclable Outer Box and Paper Sheets. MANUFACTURED AND SOLD FROM Suffolk, England.
description: Product description The Master Herbalist's Hanging Wardrobe Freshener or Drawer Sachet to complement our Traditional Scented Drawer Liners. These Wardrobe Fresheners have an elegant fragrance and come with an integrated retractable hook so you can hang it in your wardrobe or lay it in a drawer or cupboard. The design is a floral WILLIAM MORRIS print. Each Wardrobe Freshener is made from scented paper and contains a fragranced mineral pouch. It is then gently scented with our selected fragrance, ideal for keeping your wardrobes and cupboards smelling fresh and adding some colour. ALL PROUDLY MADE IN THE UK.Perfect for household drawers and cupboards. Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not swallow. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Use in a well-ventilated area. Discard product safely and responsibly, following local waste regulations.
